title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
